schema_note: Ranges below are seed placeholders based on general public estimates of Copilot Cowork credit usage, NOT verified Microsoft data. Replace with real observed figures as they're gathered (e.g. via a /cost skill or lab testing), then re-share the skill package to push the update.

archetypes.label: Single document summary or light edit (Word/Excel/PowerPoint/PDF)
archetypes.notes: One document, minimal back-and-forth, no cross-app work.

archetypes.label: Spreadsheet data analysis, formulas, or chart building
archetypes.notes: Scales up with row/column count and number of derived views requested.

archetypes.label: Enterprise search + question answering across org content
archetypes.notes: Cost grows with number of sources/repositories searched.

archetypes.label: Meeting prep, daily briefing, or 1:1 prep
archetypes.notes: Typically bounded by a single meeting/day's worth of context.

archetypes.label: Multi-file report synthesis (emails/calendar/docs -> new document)
archetypes.notes: Cost driven by how many source items must be gathered before drafting.

archetypes.label: Drafting communications, newsletters, or announcements
archetypes.notes: Close to doc_summary in cost unless it requires gathering info from multiple sources first.

archetypes.label: Cross-app workflow automation (multi-step, multiple apps/data sources)
archetypes.notes: Cost scales with number of apps touched and number of approval-gated actions.

archetypes.label: Deep research across many external/internal sources
archetypes.notes: Highest-variance archetype; scope of sources is often unknown up front.

archetypes.label: Bulk or org-wide operation (many files, many recipients, or repeated across a large set)
archetypes.notes: Treat as a strong candidate for splitting into smaller batches; flag this explicitly in tips.
